title: Wallet Security
subtitle: Protect Your Keys, Protect Your Assets
description: Master the fundamentals of wallet security — seed phrases, hardware wallets, multi-sig setups, phishing prevention, and disaster recovery. Every Web3 user's first essential skill.

lessons.title: How Wallets Work
lessons.description: Public/private key pairs, seed phrases, and address derivation.
lessons.topics: Public keys, Private keys, Seed phrases, Address derivation

lessons.title: Hot vs Cold Storage
lessons.description: Trade-offs between convenience and security for different wallet types.
lessons.topics: Hot wallets, Cold wallets, Hardware wallets, Paper wallets

lessons.title: Phishing & Scams
lessons.description: How to identify and avoid common Web3 phishing attacks and social engineering.
lessons.topics: Phishing识别, Social engineering, Fake dApps, Approval scams

lessons.title: Multi-Sig Setup
lessons.description: Configuring multi-signature wallets for team and high-value accounts.
lessons.topics: Multi-sig basics, Gnosis Safe, Signer management, Recovery options

lessons.title: Disaster Recovery
lessons.description: What to do when things go wrong — lost keys, compromised devices, emergency actions.
lessons.topics: Recovery phrases, Social recovery, Emergency procedures, Insurance

lessons.title: Wallet Hygiene
lessons.description: Daily habits and best practices for keeping your wallets safe long-term.
lessons.topics: Regular checks, Permissions audit, Address book, Backup routines
